## Meeting Purpose

[Review web analytics performance and coordinate technical improvements between Webstacks and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Looker dashboard** launched with enhanced filtering by content cohorts and improved tracking capabilities; replacing previous dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**Content performance trends**: Overall site traffic down since July Google update, but GrowthX-created content showing continued 5-10% month-over-month growth](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Older content losing traction**: Top 5 underperforming URLs were published in 2023/early 2024, suggesting content freshness is becoming a critical ranking factor](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [**LLM referral traffic** performing exceptionally well for Webstacks compared to other GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Integration for Reporting

  - [Team needs export access to HubSpot for better integration with Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Jesse will set up an automated Google Sheets integration that refreshes every 24 hours](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Current process requires manual copy/paste with formatting issues](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Jesse requested the specific sheet and data fields needed for the integration](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### New Looker Dashboard Implementation

  - [Replaced previous dashboard with enhanced multi-tab reporting system](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Key improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [URL cohorts/clusters for more granular analysis](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
      - [Toggle to filter out non-GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Conversion tracking from GA4 events](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [Detailed landing page analysis with impressions, clicks, and position data](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [LLM referral tracking by source](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Jesse requested adding a pie chart visualization showing content distribution across cohorts](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Team identified "uncategorized" content needs topic clusters assigned](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

### Traffic Analysis and Performance Trends

  - [Site-level traffic down (particularly since July Google AI Overview update)](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Impressions stable but click-through rates declining](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Five of the top seven URLs lost both position and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Common pattern: content published 18+ months ago showing significant decline](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [GrowthX-created content still growing 5-10% month-over-month despite overall site trends](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic showing exceptional growth - Webstacks is their strongest performing client in this metric](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Team discussed balancing content refreshes with new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Proposed adding FAQ schema markup to boost LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Jakub mentioned seeing this as a current SEO trend worth testing](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Jesse has schema capability in Sanity CMS but questioned FAQ placement on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
      - [Team will explore implementation options (expandable modules vs. end-of-page)](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [CTA optimization needed - current newsletter signup provides little value](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Jesse plans to replace with targeted B2B SaaS website breakdown newsletter series](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
      - [Email marketing showing good engagement despite small audience](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse will implement HubSpot-to-Google Sheets integration for reporting](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Team will determine how to balance content refreshes with new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Explore FAQ schema markup implementation for improved LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Replace generic newsletter CTA with targeted B2B SaaS website breakdown series](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Add cohort distribution visualization to Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Address uncategorized content by assigning topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/bhGNCqBRRQ6Vd22yGAPNmHm1E-pXGtsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
